title: Define Grafana operator observability boundary
goal: Decide whether Grafana should be added to the Heim-PC operator stack and, if yes, define a read-only role, datasource model, port/route plan and Leitstand relationship before any installation.

acceptance.assertion: Grafana is documented as dashboard/observability only and cannot own task truth, runtime truth, approvals, PR state, deploy state or command authority.
The live port-3000 conflict is resolved by a documented alternate bind/route plan before installation.
Initial datasources are limited to explicit operator metrics/log exports or read-only local files; no broad repository crawl or secret-bearing logs are ingested.
A later install task is blocked until the boundary doc, rollback path and smoke checks are reviewed.

metadata.source_request: grafana, n8n, bitwarden ins visier nehmen
metadata.live_risk: Grafana default port 3000 conflicts with an existing listener on heim-pc.
